testcase.name: ported remend bold-italic behavior > completes incomplete triple-asterisk spans
ported remend bold-italic behavior > handles nested code and chunk-by-chunk bold-italic recovery
ported remend bold-italic behavior > preserves overlapping bold and italic closers instead of inventing extra triple markers
ported remend broken markdown variants > matches rapid formatting switches and half-closed markers
ported remend broken markdown variants > handles escapes, incomplete links, blockquotes, tasks, tables, html, and katex tails
ported remend comparison operators > escapes comparison operators inside list items
ported remend comparison operators > does not escape blockquotes or non-comparison list content
ported remend comparison operators > keeps code blocks unchanged while still composing with other handlers
ported remend coverage gaps > covers whitespace, emphasis, code-fence, and boundary regressions visible through the parser API
ported remend edge cases > matches the frozen remend edge-case bundle on externally visible parser behavior
ported remend incomplete HTML tag stripping > strips incomplete opening and closing tags at the stream tail
ported remend incomplete HTML tag stripping > keeps complete HTML and non-tag comparisons unchanged
ported remend incomplete HTML tag stripping > does not strip incomplete tags inside code spans or fenced code blocks
ported remend mixed formatting behavior > completes incomplete bold-italic formatting and chunk boundaries
ported remend mixed formatting behavior > preserves overlapping closing markers instead of inventing new triple-asterisk spans
ported remend mixed formatting behavior > matches remend closure ordering across mixed incomplete formats
ported remend mixed formatting behavior > keeps links as the higher-priority recovery path over formatting completion
ported remend mixed formatting behavior > matches rapid successive formatting switches from remend regression cases
ported remend setext heading handling > guards streamed single and double underline markers with a zero-width space
ported remend setext heading handling > does not modify complete list items or valid setext and horizontal-rule markers
ported remend setext heading handling > only guards the final streamed line
ported remend single tilde escaping > escapes single tildes between word characters
ported remend single tilde escaping > preserves complete strikethrough and non-word single tildes
ported remend single tilde escaping > does not escape tildes inside code spans or code fences
ported remend streaming behavior > handles nested formatting cut mid-stream
ported remend streaming behavior > handles headings, blockquotes, tables, and mixed incomplete formats
ported remend streaming behavior > matches the chunk-by-chunk real-world streaming expectations
ported remend underscore bug behavior > keeps word-internal underscores untouched
ported remend underscore bug behavior > still completes underscore italics at real boundaries
ported remend underscore bug behavior > avoids false underscore closure in code, html, and the original bug case
ported streamdown security literal tag preprocessing > matches the frozen literal-tag preprocessing contract
ported streamdown markdown filtering helpers > createMarkdownElement normalizes tag names and defaultUrlTransform preserves URLs
ported streamdown markdown filtering helpers > applyMarkdownUrlTransform uses the custom callback when provided
ported streamdown markdown filtering helpers > filterMarkdownTokens removes skipped raw HTML and unwraps disallowed markdown nodes
ported streamdown markdown filtering helpers > filterMarkdownTokens combines allowedElements with allowElement
ported streamdown markdown filtering helpers > filterMarkdownTokens exposes sibling children through the allowElement parent context
ported streamdown markdown filtering helpers > renderMarkdownFragment applies urlTransform before serializing safe HTML
ported streamdown markdown filtering helpers > renderHtmlToken escapes or removes raw HTML based on the filtering options
ported streamdown security preprocess custom tags > matches the frozen custom-tag preprocessing contract
ported streamdown security URL policy > recognizes the reference relative URL forms
ported streamdown security URL policy > allows tel and mailto links under the wildcard link policy
ported streamdown security URL policy > allows data images under the wildcard image policy
ported streamdown security URL policy > blocks unsafe protocols even when wildcard prefixes are used
ported streamdown security URL policy > preserves relative URLs after same-origin prefix checks
ported streamdown render helpers > renders a fixture through shared DOM helpers
ported streamdown animation surface > animated compatibility wraps words, preserves text flow, and skips inline code
ported streamdown animation surface > animated=true uses the default 40ms stagger between words
ported streamdown animation surface > animated compatibility supports custom animation strings, easing, and staggered char delays
ported streamdown animation surface > local animation prop supports staggered character animation
ported streamdown animation surface > local animation prop preserves explicit zero duration
ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > closes on Escape pressed on the backdrop
ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > ignores non-Escape keys on the backdrop
ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > stops click propagation inside the modal content
ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > stops Escape propagation inside the modal content
ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > locks body scroll while the modal is open and restores it on unmount
ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > closes via the document Escape listener
ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > confirms the destination and closes the modal
ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > handles clipboard copy failures without closing the modal
testcase.system-err: Failed to copy to clipboard: [Error: Copy failed]

testcase.name: ported streamdown link safety modal keyboard interactions > uses a scrollable URL container for long links
ported streamdown scroll lock utility > reference-counts nested body locks and restores the original overflow after the final release
ported streamdown streaming update behavior > fires animation lifecycle callbacks on streaming state transitions only
ported streamdown streaming update behavior > hides the caret for an incomplete code fence and restores it when the fence closes
ported streamdown streaming update behavior > keeps existing list item spans mounted when a new list group appears
ported streamdown streaming update behavior > keeps existing animated characters at 0ms when streamed text grows
ported streamdown code and table controls > copies and downloads code blocks through the local control surface
ported streamdown code and table controls > supports granular code controls and disables code actions while streaming
ported streamdown code and table controls > opens table menus and exports markdown and csv payloads
ported streamdown code and table controls > aligns table wrapper, fullscreen, and menu formats with the reference surface
ported streamdown code and table controls > supports per-control table configuration
ported streamdown code block controls > copies and downloads code blocks with the resolved file extension
ported streamdown code block controls > falls back to .txt for unknown code languages and disables actions while animating
ported streamdown incomplete code block handling > useIsCodeFenceIncomplete returns true for an unclosed streamed fence
ported streamdown incomplete code block handling > useIsCodeFenceIncomplete stays false once the last streamed block is complete
ported streamdown incomplete code block handling > marks only unclosed streamed code blocks with the data-incomplete attribute
ported streamdown mermaid controls > downloads mermaid source and rendered svg, then toggles fullscreen state
ported streamdown mermaid controls > supports granular controls and a custom mermaid error component
ported streamdown mermaid download controls > toggles the download menu and exposes PNG, SVG, and MMD actions
ported streamdown mermaid download controls > downloads Mermaid source, SVG markup, and PNG blobs
ported streamdown mermaid fullscreen control > toggles fullscreen state and exits on Escape
ported streamdown pan-zoom pointer interactions > zooms on wheel input and pans on mouse drag
ported streamdown pan-zoom controls > renders zoom controls and updates the transform on button clicks
ported streamdown pan-zoom controls > hides pan-zoom controls when disabled
ported streamdown controls prop > shows controls by default and when controls is true
ported streamdown controls prop > hides code and table controls when controls is false
ported streamdown controls prop > supports mixed object controls for table and code surfaces
ported streamdown table controls > opens copy and download menus with the local formats and payloads
ported streamdown table controls > toggles table fullscreen with escape, backdrop close, and body scroll locking
ported streamdown table controls > disables fullscreen when the stream is animating
ported streamdown caret rendering > renders block and circle carets while streaming animation is active
ported streamdown caret rendering > adds and removes caret styles as animation state changes
ported streamdown caret rendering > shows an empty caret placeholder for empty content
ported streamdown caret rendering > does not apply caret styles in static mode
inline citation widgets > renders list-mode citations with linked source entries
inline citation widgets > renders carousel-mode citations with navigation controls
ported streamdown CJK-friendly rendering > splits autolinks at CJK boundary punctuation when plugins.cjk is enabled
ported streamdown CJK-friendly rendering > matches CJK autolinks when they are wrapped in opening punctuation
ported streamdown CJK-friendly rendering > supports multiple CJK boundary characters without swallowing surrounding text
ported streamdown code block context analogue > exposes the active streamdown context to custom code components through useStreamdown
ported streamdown code block features > shows line numbers by default and strips metastring from the language label
ported streamdown code block features > hides line numbers when lineNumbers is disabled globally
ported streamdown code block features > hides line numbers for noLineNumbers fenced-code metadata
ported streamdown code block rendering parity > renders block code outside paragraphs while inline code stays inside paragraph content
ported streamdown code block rendering parity > exposes the code block body language and honors line-number metadata
ported streamdown code block rendering parity > keeps code readable before the highlighter is ready and renders no loading spinner
ported streamdown component overrides > renders the default component map for headings, lists, links, blockquotes, and code
ported streamdown component overrides > supports reference-style components overrides for headings, paragraphs, links, images, tables, and inline code
ported streamdown component overrides > keeps snippet overrides ahead of components for the same token
ported streamdown component overrides > keeps block code overrides working while inlineCode only affects codespans
ported streamdown core props > streaming mode completes incomplete markdown by default
ported streamdown core props > static mode leaves incomplete markdown unparsed
ported streamdown core props > parseIncompleteMarkdown={false} disables the streaming completion pass
ported streamdown core props > dir="auto" detects RTL text in static mode
ported streamdown core props > dir="auto" applies per-block direction in streaming mode
ported streamdown core props > prefix prefixes root and internal Tailwind utility classes
ported streamdown core props > caret and isAnimating expose the active caret style
ported streamdown core props > caret renders an empty placeholder when content is empty
ported streamdown core props > animated + isAnimating uses the animation compatibility layer
ported streamdown core props > animation callbacks track isAnimating transitions
ported streamdown core props > lineNumbers toggles the code line-number compatibility class
ported streamdown custom renderer contract > renders a custom renderer for a matching fenced language
ported streamdown custom renderer contract > forwards language, code, and isIncomplete props to the renderer
ported streamdown custom renderer contract > falls back to the default code block when no renderer matches
ported streamdown custom renderer contract > supports multiple renderer entries independently
ported streamdown custom renderer contract > supports array language matches for a single renderer entry
ported streamdown custom renderer contract > preserves the default code block path when no renderers are configured
ported streamdown custom renderer contract > forwards code fence meta to the custom renderer when present
ported streamdown custom renderer contract > passes undefined meta when no metastring is present
ported streamdown footnote rendering > renders footnote references and a trailing section with backrefs
ported streamdown footnote rendering > filters empty footnotes out of the rendered section
ported streamdown footnote rendering > keeps multi-line footnotes and excludes the synthetic placeholder entry
ported streamdown html entities > decodes html entities in plain text and link text without decoding code spans
ported streamdown image and footnote rendering > renders safe images with src and alt text
ported streamdown image and footnote rendering > renders footnote references and definitions through a trailing footnotes section
ported streamdown image and footnote rendering > hides empty footnote items until definition content exists
ported streamdown image rendering > keeps standalone images out of paragraph wrappers to avoid hydration mismatches
ported streamdown image rendering > keeps inline images inside paragraph content
ported streamdown image rendering > renders safe and relative images but blocks unsafe image urls
ported streamdown image rendering > shows download controls after load and fallback content after error
ported streamdown image rendering > treats already-complete cached images as loaded on mount
ported streamdown inline code contract > renders custom inlineCode components for codespans
ported streamdown inline code contract > does not apply inlineCode overrides to fenced code blocks
ported streamdown inline code contract > lets code and inlineCode be overridden independently
ported streamdown math rendering > renders block KaTeX output with display classes
testcase.system-err: LaTeX-incompatible input and strict mode is set to 'warn': In LaTeX, \\ or \newline does nothing in display mode [newLineInDisplayMode] LaTeX-incompatible input and strict mode is set to 'warn': In LaTeX, \\ or \newline does nothing in display mode [newLineInDisplayMode]

testcase.name: ported streamdown math rendering > renders inline and block math with the local math plugin contract
testcase.system-err:
LaTeX-incompatible input and strict mode is set to 'warn': In LaTeX, \ or 
ewline does nothing in display mode [newLineInDisplayMode] LaTeX-incompatible input and strict mode is set to 'warn': In LaTeX, \ or 
ewline does nothing in display mode [newLineInDisplayMode] LaTeX-incompatible input and strict mode is set to 'warn': In LaTeX, \ or 
ewline does nothing in display mode [newLineInDisplayMode]

testcase.name: ported streamdown math rendering > keeps matrix equations intact when preceded by text
ported streamdown math rendering > renders matrix equations even when the closing $$ is incomplete
ported streamdown mermaid component > renders accessible SVG output and forwards custom mermaid config
ported streamdown mermaid component > renders fallback and custom mermaid error content
ported streamdown mermaid component > keeps the last valid SVG when a rerender fails
ported streamdown mermaid utilities > serializes SVG markup with XML namespaces and finds DOM-backed markup
ported streamdown mermaid utilities > prefers renderSvg when provided
ported streamdown mermaid utilities > converts SVG markup to PNG blobs with default and custom scale
ported streamdown mermaid utilities > rejects when canvas creation or encoding fails
ported streamdown mermaid rendering > renders mermaid blocks through plugins.mermaid with local controls
ported streamdown mermaid rendering > renders the static Mermaid fallback when no renderer is configured
ported streamdown node attribute removal regression > removes the code-block incomplete attribute when a streamed fence becomes complete
ported streamdown plugin contract > activates the full code component through plugins.code
ported streamdown plugin contract > renders KaTeX output when plugins.math is provided
ported streamdown plugin contract > renders mermaid controls via plugins.mermaid without local component overrides
ported streamdown plugin contract > uses plugins.renderers for matching fenced code blocks and forwards meta
ported streamdown plugin contract > splits bare autolinks at CJK punctuation when plugins.cjk is enabled
ported streamdown root contract > renders the core markdown surface in static mode
ported streamdown root contract > merges component overrides with the default rendering surface
ported streamdown root contract > parses incomplete markdown by default and leaves it raw when disabled
ported streamdown root contract > prefixes internal classes and preserves RTL direction helpers
ported streamdown root contract > fires animation lifecycle callbacks and animates streamed text from the root surface
ported streamdown root contract > renders allowlisted custom tags from the root component surface
ported streamdown translations > applies custom translations across code, table, mermaid, and image fallbacks
ported streamdown security allowed tags > preserves explicitly allowed custom tags
ported streamdown security allowed tags > keeps allowed attributes and strips blocked ones
ported streamdown security allowed tags > strips unknown custom tags while preserving text content
ported streamdown security allowed tags > keeps multiline custom tags intact across blank lines
ported streamdown security allowed tags > keeps sibling multiline custom tag blocks separate in streaming mode
ported streamdown security email addresses > renders a bare email address unchanged with incomplete-markdown repair enabled
ported streamdown security email addresses > renders email addresses inside sentences and repeated addresses unchanged
ported streamdown security email addresses > preserves email addresses when incomplete-markdown repair is disabled
ported streamdown security escape HTML > escapes raw HTML when renderHtml is disabled
ported streamdown security escape HTML > renders raw HTML through the default security pipeline when renderHtml is enabled
ported streamdown security HTML block multiline > renders multiline content inside details elements
ported streamdown security HTML block multiline > renders multiline content inside div elements
ported streamdown security HTML block multiline > keeps multiple paragraphs inside details blocks
ported streamdown security HTML block multiline > preserves nested HTML block structure
ported streamdown security HTML handling > renders safe inline HTML through the default security pipeline
ported streamdown security HTML handling > renders multiline content inside details blocks
ported streamdown security HTML handling > renders safe self-closing img HTML blocks
ported streamdown security HTML handling > preserves GFM tables inside details blocks
ported streamdown security HTML handling > reference normalizeHtmlIndentation renders indented HTML blocks as HTML
ported streamdown security link safety > renders a normal anchor when linkSafety is disabled
ported streamdown security link safety > intercepts external links and shows the confirmation modal by default
ported streamdown security link safety > skips the modal when onLinkCheck allows the destination
ported streamdown security link safety > shows the modal when onLinkCheck rejects the destination
ported streamdown security link safety > opens the destination when the modal confirm button is clicked
ported streamdown security link safety > copies the destination URL from the modal
ported streamdown security literal tag rendering > treats configured custom-tag content as literal text
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > defaultUrlTransform passes through URLs unchanged
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > allowedElements keeps only the allowed markdown elements
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > disallowedElements removes targeted elements
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > allowElement filters elements with a callback
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > allowElement receives parent children for sibling-aware filtering
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > unwrapDisallowed keeps children when a wrapper element is filtered
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > skipHtml strips raw HTML tokens while keeping surrounding markdown text
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > urlTransform rewrites image URLs before rendering
ported streamdown markdown filtering surface > urlTransform can remove link href values without removing the anchor text
ported streamdown security normalize HTML indentation > normalizes indented HTML tags inside HTML blocks
ported streamdown security normalize HTML indentation > leaves non-HTML markdown unchanged
ported streamdown security normalize HTML indentation > renders indented HTML blocks as HTML when the compatibility prop is enabled
ported streamdown security normalize HTML indentation > preserves complex nested HTML after normalization
ported streamdown security tel links > renders tel links
ported streamdown security tel links > renders tel, mailto, and http links together
ported streamdown security tel links > renders international tel links
ported streamdown security URL rendering > renders tel, mailto, and http links with the default wildcard policy
ported streamdown security URL rendering > preserves relative and fragment links
ported streamdown security URL rendering > blocks javascript links instead of rendering anchors
ported streamdown security URL rendering > renders data images under the default wildcard image policy
ported streamdown security URL rendering > blocks javascript images and renders the fallback text
